rule_title: In the definition of a function-like macro, each instance of a parameter shall be enclosed in parentheses, unless it is used as the operand of # or ##.
source_reference: Klocwork MISRA C++ 2008 checker map + Cppcheck public rule coverage page where available; licensed-source verification required
